title: Cards view improvement
excerpt:
Thank for the Cards view posibility, I would like see the option to set how many rows to show the Name content. 
Currently it only with 2 rows to show the name content, it will help much if I can set it for 3 or 4 rows, …

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank for the Cards view posibility, I would like see the option to set how many rows to show the Name content.

Currently it only with 2 rows to show the name content, it will help much if I can set it for 3 or 4 rows, because in first instance if we check the item and we get completely that Name content, we don’t neet to open that card … all that mean is reduce actions don’t need to take it.

Maybe current is fine for someone, but would be great leave it as an option for each admin crirterion. Specially for mobile UX
